Source: Microsoft Graph API Changelog
URL: https://developer.microsoft.com/graph/changelog/
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Microsoft Graph Changelog Summary

## Recent Permission Changes (Feb 23, 2026)
- `FileStorageContainerType.Manage.All` and `FileStorageContainerTypeReg.Manage.All` delegated permissions no longer require admin consent
- `ThreatSubmission.Read` and `ThreatSubmission.ReadWrite` now require admin consent

## Identity & Access Governance Additions

**Lifecycle Workflows Enhancements:**
- Added `userInactivityTrigger` resource for workflow execution
- New scoped activation capabilities via `activateWithScope` method
- Support for up to 100 workflows (increased from 50)
- `administrationScopeTargets` relationship added to workflow base resources

**New Insights Resources:**
- Aggregate analytics for workflow health and processing
- Methods: `topTasksProcessedSummary`, `topWorkflowsProcessedSummary`, `workflowsProcessedByCategory`

## Infrastructure as Code
Microsoft Graph Bicep resources now support deploying: user, application, group, servicePrincipal, federatedIdentityCredential, and oAuth2PermissionGrant resource types.

## Regional Expansion
Microsoft Graph activity logs are now available in China operated by 21Vianet.

## Deprecation Notice
Event Hub authentication via shared access signatures (SAS) will be deprecated; migration to Microsoft Entra ID RBAC recommended for change notification subscriptions.

## Reports & Monitoring
- Added `migrationStatus` enumeration and `relyingPartyDetailedSummary` resource
- New protocol types: nativeAuth, authenticationTransfer, and PKCE variants
- Enhanced sign-in reporting with sessionId, appOwnerTenantId properties

## External Identity
Self-service sign-up analytics now available through `selfServiceSignUp` resource for Microsoft Entra External ID.
